scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    p.ci,
    s.nombres,
    s.apellido_paterno AS ap_paterno,
    s.apellido_materno AS ap_materno,
    s.fecha_nacimiento AS fecha_nac,
    CASE WHEN s.fecha_nacimiento IS NOT NULL 
         THEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, s.fecha_nacimiento, GETDATE()) 
         ELSE NULL END AS edad,s.genero, s.estado_civil, s.municipio_residencia AS municipio,   s.numero_hijos,   s.profesion,s.nivel_estudios
FROM (
    SELECT ci FROM silver.segip WHERE ci IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.bja_inscripciones WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_madre FROM silver.bja_partos WHERE ci_madre IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_recien_nacido FROM silver.bja_partos WHERE ci_recien_nacido IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.bja_controles_prenatales WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_nino FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos WHERE ci_nino IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_madre FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos WHERE ci_madre IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.bja_pagos WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_inscripciones WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_controles WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_boletas WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_entregas WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
) p
LEFT JOIN silver.segip s ON p.ci = s.ci',
